message:
fix(cli/test): remove duplicate TestResolveEnsembleSessionRejectsInvalidSessionName

internal/cli/cli_test.go had TestResolveEnsembleSessionRejectsInvalidSessionName
defined twice in the same file (lines 1186 and 1237 of the pre-
commit version), which Go's compiler would reject outright with a
"function already declared" error at `go test ./...` time.  The
duplicate was introduced during an earlier merge where two branches
both added the same focused session-name escape test and neither
noticed the collision on merge.

Keep the first copy (the earlier declaration wins by convention)
and delete the second.  Both copies had identical bodies, so this
is a pure de-duplication with no behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
